headline: Wall Street Breakfast Podcast: Soda & Chips: McDonald's And AMD In Focus
summary: McDonald's adds barista-style role to stores as part of refreshers & crafted soda launch. AMD shoots up as Q1 results, guidance top estimates. Apple to pay $250M to settle with shareholders.

headline: Pizza Pizza Royalty: Domino's Eats Their Lunch - Again (Rating Downgrade)
summary: Pizza Pizza faces operational headwinds, with two consecutive quarters of same-store sales declines and increased competition. See why PZA:CA stock is a Hold.
